testing.rationale: Testing checklist is always-on for negative paths, edge cases, isolation, and regression coverage.

security.rationale: Security checklist applies to auth, authorization, backend, webhook, secret, and trust-boundary changes.

maintainability.rationale: Maintainability checklist is always-on for complexity, readability, and behavior-preserving cleanup.

performance.rationale: Performance checklist applies to frontend or backend execution paths where rendering, query, bundle, or latency regressions are plausible.

accessibility.rationale: Accessibility checklist applies to S2's OAuth consent flow, the AI Preferences panel keyboard activation (setBuddy / accessibleName / Enter+Space on the status-bar widget), and WS-4's four-tab IA keyboard navigation. Browser-facing UI is in scope via the Gemini sign-in handoff.

design.rationale: S2 ships first multi-surface design work: WS-4 four-tab top-level IA, marginalia rail primitive, status-bar pulse animation, AI Preferences panel layout, and the OAuth-flow state machine. DESIGN.md must be amended with three new component specs via /design-consultation, and a real design-contract.md is required before /handoff.

design_review.reason: S2 ships first multi-surface design work (WS-4: four-tab IA + marginalia rail primitive + Gemini OAuth flow). /design-consultation is the contract path.

checklist_rationale.rationale: S2 ships first multi-surface design work: WS-4 four-tab IA, marginalia rail primitive, status-bar pulse animation, AI Preferences panel, OAuth-flow state machine.
OAuth browser handoff plus keyboard activation across the AI Preferences panel and four-tab IA require accessibility coverage.

simplify.reason: Maintainability review supports a behavior-preserving simplification pass when complexity advisories appear. Checklist-backed rationale: maintainability review/specialists/maintainability.md - Maintainability checklist is always-on for complexity, readability, and behavior-preserving cleanup.

checklist_rationale.rationale: Maintainability checklist is always-on for complexity, readability, and behavior-preserving cleanup.

cso.reason: Auth, permission, webhook, or security-sensitive surfaces changed, so `/cso` should be available. Checklist-backed rationale: security review/specialists/security.md - Security checklist applies to auth, authorization, backend, webhook, secret, and trust-boundary changes.

checklist_rationale.rationale: Security checklist applies to auth, authorization, backend, webhook, secret, and trust-boundary changes.

s2_success_criteria.summary: Plotter Pat opens Preferences -> AI, sees master toggle off and three provider options (Ollama / Anthropic / Gemini).
Sign in with Google in Preferences -> AI -> Gemini completes OAuth and status bar shows `AI: ready (gemini)`.
s2_success_criteria.evidence_artifact: tests/test_ai/test_oauth_flow.py + qa-report.md smoke screenshot of status bar

s2_success_criteria.summary: Toggle AI on for the rewrite feature flag (feature itself ships in S3). AIConfig schema bumped 1->2; forward-compat unknown-key tolerance verified.
s2_success_criteria.evidence_artifact: tests/test_ai/test_config_persistence.py: per-feature opt-in round-trip + _SCHEMA_VERSION=2 assertion + unknown-key forward-compat test

s2_success_criteria.summary: Dry-run button returns a staged result via Gemini with a token estimate shown before the call; 20% accuracy bound holds.
s2_success_criteria.evidence_artifact: tests/test_ai/test_tokens_accuracy.py + manual smoke entry in qa-report.md

s2_success_criteria.summary: AI tab shows the EDITOR'S NOTES empty state with Design-specified copy, Foxing kind line, and left-aligned layout.
Toggle AI off returns status bar to `AI: off` and the network goes silent.
test_privacy.py passes with three providers registered, AI off, and no SDK modules in sys.modules after import novelwriter.ai.
CI privacy assertion: no `import httpx` / `import requests` outside novelwriter/ai/transport.py.

Window title says plotwright; About dialog says 'About plotwright' with GPL-3 upstream attribution preserved; appHandle renamed (user-data dir migration not needed since rename ships before first fork release).
s2_success_criteria.evidence_artifact: tests/test_branding.py + release-gate-record.md screenshot + make i18n .pot diff committed in qa-report.md

s2_success_criteria.summary: Migrator Mira opens existing project; four tabs visible; AI off by default; appHandle already renamed so no migration burden.
test_oauth_flow.py passes (PKCE handshake + refresh-token round-trip + revoke-on-disable + state-parameter CSRF check).
test_tokens_accuracy.py passes against the committed corpus at the 20% accuracy bound.
test_provider_contract.py passes parametrized over Mock + Ollama + Anthropic + Gemini.
test_auth_strategies.py passes (NoAuth / ApiKeyAuth / OAuthCreds behavior in isolation).
test_keychain_oauth.py passes (JSON-blob round-trip through OSKeyChainStore via FakeKeyStore).
test_provider_construction_offline.py passes (every cloud provider constructs inside network_sentinel without socket activity).
Manual smoke: real Anthropic + Gemini calls work end-to-end with real keys; staging produces a usable StagedRewrite.
Real design-contract.md exists for WS-4 surfaces; DESIGN.md extended with the three new component specs (four-tab IA, marginalia-rail empty state, auth-flow state machine).

Keyboard accessibility: Cmd/Ctrl+1..4 cycles the four-tab IA; status-bar AI widget Enter/Space activates Preferences; AI Preferences panel sets accessibleName for every QComboBox and QPushButton; Sign in with Google button has tab order after radio group and visible focus ring.
